<?php /* * This file is part of Psy Shell. * * (c) 2012-2026 Justin Hileman * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Psy\VarDumper; /** * Presenter injects itself as a dependency to all objects which * implement PresenterAware. */ interface PresenterAware { /** * Set a reference to the Presenter. */ public function setPresenter(Presenter $presenter); }
